2603.25178.title: Bilingual Text-to-Motion Generation: A New Benchmark and Baselines
2603.25178.paper_summary: Text-to-motion generation holds significant potential for cross-linguistic applications, yet it is hindered by the lack of bilingual datasets and the poor cross-lingual semantic understanding of existing language models. To address these gaps, we introduce BiHumanML3D, the first bilingual text-to-motion benchmark, constructed via LLM-assisted annotation and rigorous manual correction. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective baseline, Bilingual Motion Diffusion (BiMD), featuring Cross-Lingual Alignment (CLA). CLA explicitly aligns semantic representations across languages, creating a robust conditional space that enables high-quality motion generation from bilingual inputs, including zero-shot code-switching scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BiMD with CLA achieves an FID of 0.045 vs. 0.169 and R@3 of 82.8\% vs. 80.8\%, significantly outperforms monolingual diffusion models and translation baselines on BiHumanML3D, underscoring the critical necessity and reliability of our dataset and the effectiveness of our alignment strategy for cross-lingual motion synthesis. The dataset and code are released at \href{https://wengwanjiang.github.io/BilingualT2M-page}{https://wengwanjiang.github.io/BilingualT2M-page}
2603.25178.paper_summary_zh: 文本到運動生成在跨語言應用中具有重要潛力，但受到缺乏雙語數據集和現有語言模型的跨語言語義理解不足的阻礙。為了解決這些問題，我們推出了BiHumanML3D，這是第一個雙語文本到運動基準，通過大型語言模型輔助標註和嚴格的手動修正構建而成。此外，我們提出了一個簡單但有效的基線，雙語運動擴散（BiMD），其特點是跨語言對齊（CLA）。CLA明確對齊語言之間的語義表示，創建一個穩健的條件空間，使得從雙語輸入生成高質量運動成為可能，包括零樣本代碼切換場景。大量實驗表明，具有CLA的BiMD達到了0.045的FID和82.8\%的R@3，相較於0.169和80.8\%，顯著超越了單語擴散模型和BiHumanML3D上的翻譯基線，強調了我們數據集的關鍵必要性和可靠性，以及我們的對齊策略在跨語言運動合成中的有效性。數據集和代碼已在 \href{https://wengwanjiang.github.io/BilingualT2M-page}{https://wengwanjiang.github.io/BilingualT2M-page} 發布。
2603.25178.author: Wanjiang Weng et.al.
2603.25178.authors: Wanjiang Weng, Xiaofeng Tan, Xiangbo Shu, Guo-Sen Xie, Pan Zhou, Hongsong Wang
